summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of redesigned Development OS landing page. All core functionality working perfectly including Emergent-style design, animated terminal, navigation, CTA buttons, bento grid workflow section, and footer links. Runtime error in TerminalDemo component successfully fixed.
passed_tests: Landing page loads without errors
Hero section displays correctly with animated terminal
Navigation links work (How it works, For Builders)
All CTA buttons navigate correctly to /client/auth and /builder/auth
Navigation 'Start Project' button redirects to /client/auth
Navigation 'Join as Builder' button redirects to /builder/auth
Hero 'Start Your Project' button redirects to /client/auth
Hero 'Join as Builder' button redirects to /builder/auth
Builders 'Apply to Build' button redirects to /builder/auth
Final CTA 'Start Your Project' button redirects to /client/auth
Footer 'Client Portal' button redirects to /client/auth
Footer 'Builder Portal' button redirects to /builder/auth
Workflow bento grid section renders all 4 cards correctly
Submit card (blue, with Layers icon) displays properly
Execute card (purple, with Terminal icon and code image) displays properly
Ship card (green, with Rocket icon) displays properly
Metrics card (gradient, with statistics: 500+, 200+, 4 weeks, 98%) displays properly
Builders section renders with developer image successfully
Developer image loads correctly
Tech stack overlay displays properly
Footer links work correctly
Animated terminal functionality working perfectly
Terminal header with traffic lights displays
DevOS command sequences animate correctly
Terminal cursor animation working
No JavaScript errors or runtime errors found
Page performance is excellent (load time < 1ms)
Emergent-style design implemented successfully
